userReportedError: 闪卡数据加载失败 · SG 闪卡 · 年度模拟
errorText: '闪卡数据加载失败' displayed when loadDeckAsync rejects
triggerPath: exam-menu.js:119 — navigates to flashcard-quiz (OLD page) instead of flashcard-deck-select

rootCauseChain.problem: Points to deprecated flashcard-quiz page instead of flashcard-deck-select page
loadDeckAsync deliberately disabled — subpackage-local loader required
flashcard-quiz page uses the disabled loadDeckAsync, which always fails

fix: Change exam-menu.js:119 to navigate to flashcard-deck-select instead of flashcard-quiz
impactedEntries: IT Passport 闪卡 button on exam-menu page
SG 闪卡 button on exam-menu page
notImpactedEntries: flashcards page → flashcard-deck-select (uses correct path from pages/flashcards/flashcards.js:181)
